name: Azure Cove
description: A C-shaped cove on the Cerulean Sea, protected by a reef between two peninsulas. Calm waters, reliable currents, and the kind of beauty that makes animals stay.

name: Solverde
tagline: Where the green sun meets the sea
description: A beach town built at animal scale from salvaged human materials. Whitewashed plaster walls, terracotta roofs, sea-glass windows, and mosaic floors from salvaged tile. The name comes from old human resort signage the animals adopted. The humans meant it as marketing. The animals made it true.
